transcript.clean_text: foreign is reaching its conclusion live and On Demand on gcn plus the Riders turned up at Monte lucari for the first ever time in the history of the jittered Italia different bike setups different types of bikes a mountain time trial like little others we've ever seen before a recently relayed Road a bike exchange point on the road that was 25 meters long the rules explained as the teams tried to practice what was going to happen later in the day afternoon less than a minute separated first from third and it seemed like the whole of Slovenia was in town to see if Primos roglich could overturn the 26 second deficit behind Garrett Thomas to win the Judith Italia just under 19 kilometers separated the start from the Finish plenty of climbing meters along the way ramps of up to 22 percent not even any cars allowed up to the top right is returning to base via a ski lift it was all pretty unique in this giudad Italia Grand Finale there were some super early times rad is going off in three ways but it was those in the last wave that would set the times Jay Vine in the lead the Australian time trial Champion though bumped out the way by his own teammate Brandon McNulty already a stage winner is geodor as a candidate to do that again and then sepkus turned up two seconds in his favor Primos rocklich's teammate may be showing us what was to come the top three waited prepared and were ready a fair play handshake and they were good to go I'll made her at 59 seconds roglitch at 26 seconds and right on his nation's border the stage was set with the rotten memory still fairly raw of what happened in 2020 Primos roglich was trying to avoid another disaster in a mountain time trial perhaps hoping to lay the ghost to rest he started quicker than gay right Thomas but the difference at the bottom of the climb wasn't enough to win vegetalia Thomas stopped a little longer down the bottom changing helmet as well as bike but he still looked good at this point the Welshman hoping to become the first man from his Nation to win the Judo two seconds the difference at the bottom but the Gap would start to grow when the road went uphill Timor Pino was also racing brilliantly going into the lead and dreaming at that final stage when when we least expected it roglitch putting 32 seconds into those watching on but look at that oh dear oh dear oh dear another mechanical more disaster and after leading well he would soon have issues in the meantime went into the lead did you all made it but he wouldn't be in the hot seat long because Primos rockitch would re-find his rhythm roared on by his supporters roglitch up the top racing the victory at the very least a stage win the clock stopped 42 seconds quicker the Olympic champion winning the stage but where would Thomas finish Thomas was further down the mountain slowing as he continued to ride up the Clock Was ticking as he came into the final few hundred meters at those 26 seconds he needed disappeared 40 second shift primozroglich overturning the Gerald Italia winning it by 14 seconds cue Delight pandemonium even for his team and supporters Delight for primozroglich who eventually let all the emotion pour out disappointment for ineos and Garrett Thomas who lost it at the very last what a story what a script I couldn't even come up with this in Hollywood pretty much roglitch winning the stage by 40 seconds from Garrett Thomas 42 ahead of Almeida with Carol Zampino in the top five the same order that the general classification would finish in as Primo droglich pulled on the pink jersey knowing that 24 hours later borrowing incident or accident he will win the jeded Italia in Rome 14 seconds ahead of Thomas 115 ahead of Almeida will be the first Portuguese to finish on a grand tour Podium since the 1970s rocklich the first Slovenian winner garan Thomas at 37 with a sensational Grand Tour podium one stage remains then it's the Eternal City it's Rome it should be one for the sprinters a couple of intermediate Sprints along the way and after 126 kilometers Rome will bid goodbye to the 106th Judo that for the first time will be won by Slovenian legit Italia live and On Demand on gcn Plus foreign
